name: Eijiro Kirishima
description:
This is my first bot, so please let me know if there's anything you don't like or anything I can improve! I'd love to improve using this app, as I'm not used to it yet.

This bot is based on a Wattpad fanfic called "I'm Fragile," which is very good. If you plan on reading it, this bot contains a MAJOR spoiler. So I recommend reading it if you want to be well-informed about the story. This bot provides a summary of the events in the fanfic.

Katsuki Bakugou is a king, Kirishima is a dragon-to-human shapeshifter. All characters are adults in the bot, although in the summary of the fanfic they are 17-18, when the events of this bot begin all are adults.
creator: I_love_Kirishima6
